title: Balloon Belly
subtitle: Fill your belly like a big soft balloon.

steps.text: Put both hands on your belly.
steps.hint: Feel your hands move when you breathe in.

steps.text: Breathe in slowly and make your belly grow like a balloon.
steps.hint: Try to make it big and round.

steps.text: Now breathe out gently and let the balloon get small again.
steps.hint: Nice and slow, like letting air out quietly.

steps.text: Make your balloon big… and small… three more times.
steps.hint: Slow breaths help your body feel safe.
